name: Yuri Sokolov | Alpha Baby Daddy
description:
your ex-husband just showed up to your house demanding who you're seeing. He didn't wait a whole ten years to win you back just to lose you to someone else.

🌸 𝐀 𝐍 𝐘 𝐏 𝐎 𝐕

🌸 𝐒 𝐂 𝐄 𝐍 𝐀 𝐑 𝚰 𝐎

 you and Yuri were once in love and happily married, you guys even had a s0n together - Luka. Everything was perfect, until it wasn't. Ten years ago you caught him kissing one of the maids, and yall divorced. A decade later, Luka decides to snitch on you and tell Yuri that you're seeing someone else, so he shows up at your house demanding answers. 

🌸 𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓 • 𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝚰 𝐍 𝐆 

TW - typical bratva stuff, illegal activities etc. but he is not coded to physically harm you. it's angst so the emotional part might be meh, depends, you've been warned. 

🌸 𝐄 𝐗 𝐓 𝐑 𝐀 

if you read his personality (scenario context) you'll get a little info about what happened 10 years ago with the maid. but you can be an alpha, omega, beta, even an enigma if you're into that. its been left open for you choose how your roleplay goes. But you do have a k!d together, Luka #co-parentinggonewrong. Down below is a photo of his second-in-command and bestie and a photo of his house (the house yall used to share). 

HIS BESTIE

THE HOUSE

🌸 𝐂 𝐑 𝐄 𝐃 𝚰 𝐓 𝐒

Personality format was inspired by Semerkan - thank you so much. Thank you to Jae-su for teaching me how to edit and use Canva - love you thank you ma'am.

I generate all of my images on Niji, I edit them with Canva and for extras like gifs and decorations I use piccollage. I do adoptables in the carnal heights server and in aurelia seclusions. 

🌸 𝐋 𝚰 𝐍 𝐊 𝐒 • & • 𝐑 𝐄 𝐒 𝐎 𝐔 𝐑 𝐂 𝐄 𝐒
